feedback.summary: G-003 Drag-fill implementation PASS 100/90. All 24 rubric items evaluated: 17 YES, 0 NO, 7 N/A (proper exclusion). Core deliverables: DragFillHandle React component (drag state via 3 refs, AC-004 virtualization compat via getCellRect abstraction), fillRange + detectSeriesStep pure functions (generic TCell, no any), spec code defects self-corrected (unused destructure + dead branch removed), full AC compliance verified.
feedback.specCodeDefectsDetail: Implementer correctly identified + fixed 2 spec template issues: (1) coordFromMouseEvent unused { start, end } destruct (spec L307-309 vs impl not using it) — removed in actual code; (2) generateFillValue dead branch (spec L235 if(length===0) unreachable after L123 guard && sourceValues.length > 0) — spec should update L235 guard logic on next revision. Both fixes reasonable (C-12 + tsc noUnusedLocals enforcement).
feedback.c29Compliance: optional props (onFillComplete, onFillTargetChange) handled correctly. DragFillHandle internally uses !== undefined guards (L130, L164) before invoking, avoiding undefined literal spread per C-29. spec example (Section 4.4) shows spread-skip pattern which implementer follows (implied in optional callback handling).
feedback.c31WireUpConfirmed: fillRange utility: DragFillHandle.tsx L12 import → L165 invoke → L166 apply (onFillComplete callback). Result flows to caller for updateRow batching per AC-003 (MOD-GRID-10 separation, D3). No dead code risk.
feedback.c32MigrationImpactVerification: goals.json L193 'medium' matches implement-score L7 'medium'. Tier 90 threshold correctly applied. medium-tier C-17 visual regression deferred to G-006 (affectedUsageFiles=[] now). score 100 valid under medium tier.
feedback.nextStage: Proceed to verify stage (implement → verify transition). G-003 ready.
